channel.title: "Lei Jun" - Google News
channel.description: Google News person search fixture (synthetic test data)

item.title: Lei Jun unveils Xiaomi SU7 Ultra performance record - Reuters
item.description: Lei Jun presented the Xiaomi SU7 Ultra and a new lap record.

item.title: Xiaomi SU7 Ultra sets new track benchmark
item.description: Founder Lei Jun celebrated the benchmark run with the engineering team.

item.title: Xiaomi shares rise on strong EV sales
item.description: EV deliveries beat expectations in the second quarter.

item.title: Elon Musk responds to Lei Jun's Xiaomi SU7 challenge
item.description: Elon Musk and Lei Jun traded benchmark claims over the weekend.

item.title: Lei Jun interview from last year resurfaces
item.description: An archive interview with Lei Jun about the SU7 program.
